headline: Supreme Court Verdict Tests Eli Lilly Valuation And Legal Risk Outlook
summary: United States Supreme Court upholds a $220 million Medicaid fraud verdict against Eli Lilly under the False Claims Act. Decision stems from a whistleblower case and concludes a 12 year legal dispute. Ruling is described as the first jury verdict against a pharmaceutical company under this statute. Eli Lilly, NYSE: LLY, now has a material legal setback sitting alongside a large market valuation, with the stock recently trading around $1,126.80. The company has very large multi year share...

headline: Why Eli Lilly (LLY) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of global pharmaceutical company Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) jumped 3.4% in the afternoon session after CVS restored Zepbound as a co-preferred option and simultaneously added Lilly's new oral obesity pill Foundayo, making Eli Lilly's full obesity medication portfolio accessible to all three of America's largest pharmacy benefit managers for the first time.
